title: Folder
description: A named collection that groups skills.

folder_type.description: Classifies who this folder belongs to and how it was created: teacher-created content library, learner personal study space, or assigned from a training program.

owner_id.description: User this folder belongs to. For teacher/learner folders this equals created_by; for program-assigned folders this is the learner receiving the folder.

program_id.description: Training program that assigned this folder. Only set when folder_type is 'program'.

is_locked.description: When true, the owner cannot modify folder metadata or structure (typically set for program-assigned folders).

domain.description: Subject domain this folder belongs to (e.g. mathematics, computer-science).

theme.description: UI theme token for this folder.

created_by.description: User identifier that created this record.

updated_by.description: User identifier that last updated this record.
